text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The annual summer camp has begun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
What one can gain from summer camp greatly
hinges upon their frame of mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I plan to make the most of this opportunity and
use my time here productively.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Me too! "A day at camp is worth two in class"
really sums it up!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Indeed. This is a unique opportunity to devote
ourselves solely to training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I shall conquer my weaknesses at camp this year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki is as fired up as her peers. I'll have
to work hard to ensure she has a fruitful summer
camp!
